回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	114學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 英文(一) (English(I))	開課班級 : 日大學英文	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 魏健峰	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
Students can easily appreciate the major themes and diversified cultures in the textbook, and then will be able to acquire critical reading and thinking skills and develop deeper understanding and multi-faceted perceptions of the world’s multiculture.  


2.教學綱要
English(1) is a course for freshmen. There are some learning contexts which brings the world English into the classroom through Geographic topics, videos and visuals. First, in the Reading skills sections, one academic strategy will be explicitly instructed and practiced to enhance reading comprehension. Besides, the updated designed blends text, charts, graphs and images which improve comprehension skills will be demonstrated to develop students' visual literacy skills. Furthermore, the opportunities to synthesize information through the multiple sources from National Geographic videos will be engaged in some period of classes. 


3.教科書
1	書名 : Power Reading Level 3　
出版日期 : 2016年 月 
作者 : Paul Nation & Casey Malarcher　出版社 : Compass Publishing　版本 : 第一版 


4.參考書

作者 : 　出版社 : 　版本 :

6.成績評定及課堂要求
1. Quizzes: 20%; 2. Midterm: 30%; 3. Final exam: 30%; 4. Attendance & class participation 20% 
1. Be on time for the class 2. Self-respect at all aspects. 3. No any smart phone allowed. 4. Absence or any late work will not be graded unless you’ve made prior arrangements with the teacher.  
 


8.永續發展目標(SDGs)：SDG4 優質教育
